title: Enallagma sessilifolia
taxonomy: I can find information on Enallagma sessilifolia. Enallagma sessilifolia is a species of dragonfly in the family Lestidae. It is also known as the Sessile Bluet. The classification of Enallagma sessilifolia includes the kingdom Animalia, phylum Arthropoda, class Insecta, order Odonata, and family Lestidae. This classification reflects the dragonfly's unique characteristics and its position within the insect kingdom.
